reason: protobuf pinned to >=3.20.0,<=3.20.3 — required by sagemaker-containers 2.8.6.post2. Upgrading to protobuf 6.x breaks the serving stack. DoS via json_format.ParseDict() with nested Any messages; low risk in SageMaker inference where protobuf input is not user-controlled.
openssl 3.6.1 installed via conda-forge; 3.6.2 not yet available on conda-forge. TLS 1.3 key exchange group negotiation issue; low risk as SageMaker containers are not public-facing TLS servers.
Pillow pinned to 9.1.1 matching upstream sagemaker-xgboost-container. Out-of-bounds write when loading crafted PSD images; low risk as PSD loading is not part of the XGBoost inference/training path.
urllib3 pinned to 1.26.5 by botocore 1.20.52 (transitive from sagemaker-containers). Streaming API vulnerability; low risk in SageMaker container environment connecting only to trusted AWS endpoints.
urllib3 pinned to 1.26.5 by botocore 1.20.52. Unbounded decompression chain; low risk as container only connects to trusted AWS endpoints.
urllib3 pinned to 1.26.5 by botocore 1.20.52. Streaming API compressed data handling; low risk as container only connects to trusted AWS endpoints.

Jinja2 pinned to 2.11.3 — required by sagemaker-containers 2.8.6.post2 which depends on Flask 1.1.1. Upgrading Jinja2 to 3.1.6 breaks the Flask/sagemaker-containers stack. Sandbox escape via |attr filter; low risk as templates are not user-controlled in SageMaker serving.

openjdk-8 8u452 — Ubuntu 20.04 APT has not yet published the 8u462 update. Oracle Java SE 2D component vulnerability. Will auto-resolve when Ubuntu publishes the update and apt-get upgrade picks it up.
